text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Wednesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, November 20. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! That's wonderful. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Took Lily to her medical checkup. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. I can run some projections for you. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: I'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Understood. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Let's break this down. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. Great update. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: I can run some projections for you. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I've noted that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
